testcase.name: test_BUG_get_patient_strips_recall_field

failure.message: AssertionError: BUG: GET /patients/{id} does not include the persisted `recall` field. This breaks RecallFlagControl on page reload. assert None == 'shared' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad992742d80>('flag') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad992742d80> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad992753340>('recall', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad992753340> = {'anno_nascita': None, 'codice_fiscale': '', 'codice_paziente': None, 'cognome': 'Delta', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter7_recall_recent.py:145: in test_BUG_get_patient_strips_recall_field assert gp.get("recall", {}).get("flag") == "shared", ( E AssertionError: BUG: GET /patients/{id} does not include the persisted `recall` field. This breaks RecallFlagControl on page reload. E assert None == 'shared' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad992742d80>('flag') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad992742d80> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad992753340>('recall', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfad992753340> = {'anno_nascita': None, 'codice_fiscale': '', 'codice_paziente': None, 'cognome': 'Delta', ...}.get
